title: rootless: panic in podman info
body:
The last four rawhide autobuilds, beginning with 1.8.3-0.81.dev.gita858b3a.fc33, [have failed](https://jenkins-continuous-infra.apps.ci.centos.org/blue/organizations/jenkins/fedora-rawhide-build-pipeline/detail/fedora-rawhide-build-pipeline/10545/pipeline/#step-248-log-594) when running `podman info` in the rootless gating tests:
```
# $ podman info
# panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
# [signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x100 pc=0x558383e525eb]
```
e318b09b6 (previous commit) passes so it's likely that this is a side effect of #5705. @rhatdan PTAL.
